Name: File Transfer
Description: Download a file from a URL to the operation's staging directory. Streams the download — no base64 encoding. Logs bytes transferred and duration for visibility in the manifest.

SettingsInputs.Name: Filename
SettingsInputs.Description: Filename to save as in the staging directory

SettingsInputs.Name: AffinityKey
SettingsInputs.Description: Affinity key for caching (same key skips re-download)

StateOutputs.Name: LocalPath
StateOutputs.Description: Absolute path to the downloaded file in staging

StateOutputs.Name: BytesTransferred
StateOutputs.Description: Size of the downloaded file in bytes
